name: Tradional Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except the pastry shell; mix well.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared pastry shell.
4. Bake for 15 minutes at 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Reduce the oven temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a knife inserted 1 inch from the edge comes out clean.
6. Allow the pie to cool completely before serving.
7. Garnish as desired. Refrigerate leftovers.
